channel.title: influxdb on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in influxdb on IT notes

item.title: Influxdb
item.description: Basic influxdb queries, setup. You can use influx (the influxdb shell) or use the http API on port :8086 Create and apply retention policy to a database: warning this may remove/purge existing data CREATE RETENTION POLICY "30_days" ON collectd DURATION 30d REPLICATION 1 default notice the ending default that means to apply the created policy For 1 year, use 52w (52 weeks) CREATE RETENTION POLICY "a_year" ON telegraf DURATION 52w REPLICATION 1 default Show retention policies:
